grounded_technique.Grounding techniques: Grounding techniques help bring your attention back to the present moment.
grounded_technique.Choose one activity t: Choose one activity that feels supportive right now.
grounded_technique.Pick up or touch item: Pick up or touch items near you
grounded_technique.Run your hands under: Run your hands under cool or warm water.
grounded_technique.Pay attention to the: Pay attention to the sensation on your skin.
grounded_technique.Observe how it change: Observe how it changes moment by moment.
grounded_technique.Notice its texture, w: Notice its texture, weight, and temperature.
grounded_technique.Is it smooth or rough: Is it smooth or rough? Heavy or light?
grounded_technique.Let your focus stay f: Let your focus stay fully on this one object.
grounded_technique.Take a slow breath in: Take a slow breath in through your nose.
grounded_technique.Notice the flavor, te: Notice the flavor, texture, and temperature.
grounded_technique.Stay fully present wi: Stay fully present with the experience.
grounded_technique.Feel the sensation as: Feel the sensation as you swallow.
grounded_technique.Let yourself stay wit: Let yourself stay with that moment.
grounded_technique.Notice the feeling of: Notice the feeling of your feet touching the ground.
grounded_technique.Let your breath match: Let your breath match your steps.
grounded_technique.Hold the ice in your: Hold the ice in your hand.
grounded_technique.Allow the strong sens: Allow the strong sensation to anchor you to the present.
grounded_technique.Notice how it feels i: Notice how it feels in your body.
grounded_technique.Let the scent bring y: Let the scent bring you into this moment.
grounded_technique.Shift your weight fro: Shift your weight from side to side.
grounded_technique.Notice how your body: Notice how your body feels as it moves.
grounded_technique.Let your attention re: Let your attention rest on each one.
grounded_technique.Notice areas of tensi: Notice areas of tension or ease.
